headline: INSULET CORP (NASDAQ:PODD): A Textbook GARP Candidate for Affordable Growth Investors
summary: INSULET CORP (PODD) fits the Growth At A Reasonable Price (GARP) strategy with strong 9/10 growth and profitability ratings, solid financial health, and a fair valuation relative to its high earnings growth trajectory.

headline: Rothschild & Co Redburn Downgrades Insulet Corporation (PODD), Cites “Eroding” Product Moats and Distribution
summary: Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) is one of the best medical device stocks to invest in right now. On April 24, Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) was downgraded to Neutral from Buy by Rothschild & Co Redburn, with the firm bringing the price target on the stock down to $220 from $380. It told investors in a research note […]
